title: Salesforce Analytics API Limits
description: Documents format-specific row limits and recommendations for Salesforce Analytics/Reports API
addresses: Cohort #6 - Analytics API 2,000 Row Limit ($8k ROI)

SUMMARY.description: Summary format with groupings and subtotals
SUMMARY.notes: Undocumented hard limit - silently truncates at 2,000 rows
SUMMARY.use_when: Need groupings, subtotals, or summary statistics
limitations: No error when limit exceeded - silent truncation
Groups may be incomplete if underlying data >2,000 rows

TABULAR.description: Tabular format with flat row data
TABULAR.notes: No documented hard limit but performance degrades >10k rows
TABULAR.use_when: Need all rows, no groupings required

MATRIX.description: Matrix format with row and column groupings
MATRIX.notes: Same 2,000-row limit as SUMMARY - shares REST API constraint
MATRIX.use_when: Need cross-tabulation or pivot table style
limitations: Harder to parse than Summary or Tabular

JOINED.description: Joined (MultiBlock) format combining data from multiple report types
JOINED.notes: 2,000-row limit applies PER BLOCK. REST API has limited support - use Metadata API for creation.
JOINED.use_when: Comparing data across different report types, year-over-year, forecast vs actual

rest_api.notes: REST API can execute joined reports but CANNOT create or modify them

metadata_api.notes: Use sf project deploy with .report-meta.xml files

field_naming.notes: Joined reports use Object$Field format, NOT standard FIELDNAME format

cross_block_formulas.notes: Reference aggregates from any block using B{id}#{aggregate} syntax

common_grouping.notes: All blocks must share a common grouping field for proper alignment

limitations: REST API cannot create - must use Metadata API
Requires common grouping field across all blocks
Cross-block formulas limited to aggregate-level calculations
Cannot use standard report field names - must use Object$Field format

0_to_1500.reason: Any format works well within safe limits

1500_to_2000.reason: Approaching Summary/Matrix/Joined limit - monitor row count

2000_plus.reason: Summary/Matrix/Joined formats will truncate - use Tabular instead

10000_plus.reason: Standard API performance issues - use Bulk API

need_groupings.notes: Check row count first - use Tabular + client-side grouping if >2k

need_all_rows.notes: Summary/Matrix/Joined silently truncate - Tabular gets all rows

need_cross_tab.notes: Matrix format designed for cross-tabulation (2k row limit applies)

need_multi_source_comparison.notes: Joined reports compare data from different report types. 2k row limit per block.

year_over_year.notes: Joined reports are ideal for YoY, Forecast vs Actual, Pipeline vs Closed comparisons

customer_360.notes: Combine Opportunities, Cases, Activities in single report with common grouping

rest_api.notes: REST API cannot create Joined reports - can only run existing ones

metadata_api.notes: Metadata API required for creating Joined reports

via_report_metadata.description: Estimate row count before running report
via_report_metadata.method: Query report metadata for record count hints
via_report_metadata.command: sf data query --query "SELECT COUNT() FROM {ReportObject} {WHERE filters}"
via_report_metadata.notes: Estimates based on object record count and filters

via_object_count.description: Quick estimate from object record counts

automatic_switching.description: Automatically switch format when limits detected

rules.reason: Matrix has same 2k limit as Summary

rules.condition: Row estimate per block >2,000 AND format=JOINED
rules.action: Warn and suggest adding filters per block
rules.reason: Joined reports have 2k limit per block - cannot switch formats
Joined reports designed for multi-source comparisons

joined_specific.description: Strategies specific to Joined report limitations

rules.condition: Need JOINED but >2k rows per source
rules.action: Add time-based filters to each block OR use multiple separate reports
rules.reason: Cannot switch to TABULAR - must reduce rows per block

rules.action: Use Metadata API (sf project deploy) - REST API cannot create
REST API works - use Analytics API endpoint
rules.reason: REST API can run but not create joined reports

manual_override.description: Allow manual format selection with warnings
manual_override.use_case: User understands limitations and accepts truncation
manual_override.joined_notes: Cannot override JOINED creation method - Metadata API always required

silent_truncation_detected.detection: Row count = 2,000 exactly for SUMMARY format
silent_truncation_detected.action: Warn user that data may be truncated

timeout_on_large_export.recommendation: Use Bulk API for exports >10k rows

always_estimate_before_export.description: Estimate row count before running report

prefer_tabular_for_exports.description: Use Tabular format for data exports
prefer_tabular_for_exports.reason: No row limit, all data guaranteed
prefer_tabular_for_exports.exceptions: Only use Summary if groupings absolutely required AND row count <1,500

monitor_exact_2000_rows.description: Check if result is exactly 2,000 rows
monitor_exact_2000_rows.recommendation: Re-run with Tabular format (or add filters for JOINED) to get complete data

use_metadata_api_for_creation.description: Always use Metadata API (sf project deploy) to create joined reports
use_metadata_api_for_creation.reason: REST API cannot create joined reports

estimate_rows_per_block.description: Estimate row count for EACH block independently
estimate_rows_per_block.reason: 2,000-row limit applies per block, not total
estimate_rows_per_block.action: Run COUNT() queries for each block's base object/filters

choose_common_grouping_carefully.description: Select a common grouping field that exists in ALL block report types
choose_common_grouping_carefully.validation: Verify field exists in each report type before building

use_object_dollar_field_format.description: Use Object$FieldName format for field references
use_object_dollar_field_format.reason: Joined reports require explicit object qualification

validate_cross_block_formula_references.description: Ensure cross-block formulas reference existing block aggregates
validate_cross_block_formula_references.validation: Check that B1, B2 blocks exist and have named aggregates

format_selection_checklist.description: Quick checklist for choosing report format
questions: Do I need ALL rows? â†’ TABULAR (no row limit)
Do I need groupings with <2k rows? â†’ SUMMARY
Do I need cross-tabulation with <2k rows? â†’ MATRIX
Do I need to compare multiple data sources? â†’ JOINED (Metadata API)
Do I have >2k rows per source? â†’ TABULAR or split into multiple reports

joined_builder.description: Programmatic XML generation for joined reports
